claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Completed read-only performance/scaling audit of DinoBrain retrieval, wiki index, SQLite shards, invalidation paths, verifier scripts, and live data scale. No code files edited. Findings: no P0; P1 risks are that the live wiki SQLite fast path is missing/non-durable after invalidation, cold/noisy accepted memory is indexed as normal hot retrieval input, and candidate generation still uses substring/wildcard scans plus lexical dense fallback rather than bounded semantic top-K retrieval. Current final live snapshot had no wiki-index.json, no sqlite manifest, no wiki.sqlite, no dense-vectors.json; operations.sqlite and operations-index were present. Accepted records were dominated by behavior rules.
